zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Reviers於大約1128年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯列維爾斯時，他的父親Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon28歲，母親Adelise Balladon30歲。他於1184年之前與Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年9月10日在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可雙文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Reviers于大约1128年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯列維爾斯时，他的父亲Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon28岁，母亲Adelise Balladon30岁。他于1184年之前与Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年9月10日在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可雙文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reviers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French   Riviere   and possibly also of Dutch   Revier  .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Riviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Camille, Firmin, Hermite, Lucien, Monique, Stephane.

French (Rivière): topographic name for someone who lived by the bank of a river or shore of a lake, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’ (originally meaning ‘riverbank’, from Latin riparia); or a habitational name from any of various places called (La) Rivière, for example in Indre-et-Loire and Pas-de-Calais. Compare Lariviere 1 and 2.
History: Joseph Rivière from Bordeaux in Gironde, France, married Félicité Audet in Carleton, QC, in 1795.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Reviers was born about 1128, in Reviers, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon, was 28 and his mother, Adelise Balladon, was 30. He married Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon before 1184, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 10 September 1217, in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Twineham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Reviers est né environ 1128, à Reviers, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelise Balladon, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon avant 1184, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1217, à Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Twineham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Reviers um 1128 in Reviers, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon 28 und seine Mutter Adelise Balladon 30. Er hat vor 1184 in England Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. September 1217 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Twineham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Reviers è nato il circa 1128 nel Reviers, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelise Balladon, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon prima del 1184, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1217, nel Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Twineham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Reviersが約1128年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスレヴィエルズで生まれた時，父Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devonは28歳，母Adelise Balladonは30歳であった。1184年以前にイギリスでMabile Meulan Countess of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年9月10日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックストウィンエハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트
ko.lifeSummary: William de Reviers(이)가 대략 1128년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 러에비어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise Balladon(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1184년 이전 영국에서 Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 9월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트윈함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Reviers nasceu aproximadamente 1128, em Reviers, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelise Balladon, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon antes 1184, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1217, em Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Twineham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Reviers родился около 1128 г. в местности ревиирс, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise Balladon, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon перед 1184 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 сентября 1217 г. в местности исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности тваинэам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Reviers nació aproximadamente 1128, en Reviers, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelise Balladon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon antes de 1184, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1217, en Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Twineham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
